key_signals: 1d auction is above value: price 2104.64 is above 1d TPO POC 2101.41 and VAH 2103.32, while still far above AVWAP 2068.76 and 1d RVWAP 2084.0034

flow_context.story: Cross-timeframe flow is bullish overall, but only after separating higher-timeframe structure from very recent intraday selling. Structural anchor first: current price is 2104.64. On the daily auction, price is above 1d TPO POC 2101.41 and above 1d VAH 2103.32, with 1d VAL down at 2085.39; that is a bullish location. On the active 4h auction, price is above 4h TPO VAL 2101.0 but below 4h TPO POC 2108.51 and well below 4h VAH 2116.35, so the 4h is still bullish but currently rotating under overhead supply. From there the flow signals read as follows. cvd_pack: short-term bearish, because the current snapshot has delta_fut -717.479, delta_spot -17.3297, cvd_slope_fut -184.6391 and cvd_slope_spot -16.1516, and the latest 15m bar has delta_fut -1487.512 and delta_spot -418.203. However, the 4h CVD backdrop remains constructive because the 04:00 4h bar printed delta_fut +38337.315 and delta_spot +3101.3794, and the 00:00 4h bar printed delta_fut +35591.616 and delta_spot +682.2765. whale_trades: bullish, because futures whale delta notional is positive on 15m, 4h and 1d, especially +76585261.11472 over 4h and +117642873.73083 over 1d; spot whales are small but also positive on 4h and 1d. vpin: neutral-to-caution, not directional; toxicity_state is high with vpin_fut 0.706688, so flow is stressed and reversals can be sharp, but VPIN alone does not set direction. tpo_market_profile: bullish on 1d because price is above daily value, and neutral-to-bullish on 4h because price still holds above 4h VAL 2101.0 even though it is below 4h POC 2108.51. absorption: slightly bullish overall because the important bullish absorptions are below market at 2104.52, 2101.67, 2100.09 and 2097.91, while the main bearish absorption is higher at 2114.31; that means support is under price and the cap is overhead. buying_exhaustion: bearish at resistance, with confirmed events at 2110.17 and 2110.32, so upside pushes into 2110 have stalled. selling_exhaustion: mildly bullish historically because confirmed events printed at 2107.21, 2082.12, 2074.79 and 2073.36, but the most recent 2106.75 event had spot_exhaustion_confirm false and spot_continuation_risk true, so the latest one is weak. Net result: the immediate tape is bearish-to-neutral, but it is happening above 4h and 1d support, with whales and higher-timeframe structure still bullish. That is why the dominant flow bias is bullish rather than neutral or bearish.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: ETHUSDT is in a higher-timeframe uptrend that is currently digesting. The 1d is bullish and trading above daily value, the 4h is bullish but rotating below 2108.51 POC and under 2116.35 session resistance, and the 15m is not trending cleanly; it is chopping between support built by bullish absorption near 2104.52 to 2101 and resistance created by buying exhaustion and the ask wall around 2110 to 2116. In plain terms, the broader auction is still upward, but intraday order flow is fading strength into overhead supply rather than cleanly extending.

15m.story: I label 15m Sideways because the market is inside a very tight two-sided intraday range rather than cleanly trending. Current futures price is 2104.64. Local support 2104.52 is a real printed level from the latest bullish_absorption pivot_price 2104.52 confirmed at 2026-03-15T06:25:00+00:00, and it is also the 15m price-volume VAL 2104.52. Local resistance 2110.32 is a real printed level from confirmed buying_exhaustion pivot_price 2110.32 at 2026-03-15T06:21:00+00:00; the nearby ask wall at 2110.23 reinforces that ceiling. Recent candles show rejection after the push higher: 05:15 close 2108.4, 05:30 close 2111.72, 05:45 close 2106.89, 06:00 close 2108.3, 06:15 close 2105.61, and the current partial bar trades 2104.64 after a session high of 2116.35. Fast trend inputs are weak: ema_13 2106.23, ema_21 2106.72 and ema_34 2107.18 all sit above price, and 15m RVWAP is 2106.3964 with z_price_minus_rvwap -1.11, so price is below both the fast EMA band and local RVWAP. Flow on the last bar is also weak: 15m CVD at 06:30 shows delta_fut -1487.512 and delta_spot -418.203, while the global cvd_pack snapshot has delta_fut -717.479, delta_spot -17.3297, cvd_slope_fut -184.6391 and cvd_slope_spot -16.1516. Footprint is balanced rather than directional: stacked_buy=true and stacked_sell=true, with window_delta -2235.905. Price is also sitting inside the 15m volume area, not escaping it: POC 2105.7, VAH 2106.8, VAL 2104.52. The main bearish flow signals at the top of the range are explicit: buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 with score 1.0 and at 2110.32 with score 0.9981, latest bearish_divergence from 05:24 to 05:41 with price_diff 2.43 and score 0.5378, and a stronger bearish_absorption at 2114.31 with score 0.7621 and spot_confirm true. But I did not label 15m Bearish because there is equally real support under price: bullish_absorption also printed at 2101.67, 2100.09 and 2097.91, 15m whales are net buyers with fut_whale_delta_notional +1415152.208, 15m orderbook flow earlier in the window had ofi_norm_fut +0.50495 and microprice_fut 2106.59 above last trade, and bullish_initiation printed at 2100.39 with spot_break_confirm true and spot_whale_break_confirm true. I also did not label it Bullish because price is back below the fast EMA band and below RVWAP while the top-of-range exhaustion at 2110 to 2114 remains intact. With genuine bullish and bearish evidence both present and price rotating inside 2104.52 to 2110.32, Sideways is the cleanest read.

1d.story: I label 1d Bullish because the higher-timeframe price structure and auction location are clearly up despite some intraday distribution. Current price is 2104.64. Daily structure has stair-stepped higher over the recent session history: 03-10 close 1992.28, 03-11 close 2035.39, 03-12 close 2050.99, 03-13 close 2072.6, 03-14 close 2091.01, and 03-15 is currently trading above 2095.27 after printing a current-day high of 2116.35, which is above the prior day high 2105.75. The regime data is firmly bullish: ema_trend_regime trend_regime_by_tf shows 1d bull, current price is far above 1d EMA100 1919.99 and 1d EMA200 1880.89, and price is also above anchored AVWAP 2068.76 by +35.88. The daily mean-reversion reference is also supportive: 1d RVWAP is 2084.0034 with z_price_minus_rvwap +1.54, so price is above daily fair value, not below it. Auction structure is bullish too: 1d TPO POC is 2101.41, VAH 2103.32 and VAL 2085.39; price at 2104.64 is above POC and above VAH, so the market is trading above value. I use 2085.39 as daily support and 2116.35 as daily resistance because both are actual session structure values from the TPO profile and current day range. Participation supports the trend: 1d footprint window_delta is +64721.582, 1d whale flow is strongly positive with fut_whale_delta_notional +117642873.73083 and spot_whale_delta_notional +1669809.9748, and the broader 7d AVWAP relationship remains constructive. Contradicting signals do exist and I am naming them explicitly. The current 1d CVD bar is negative, with delta_fut -22903.317 and delta_spot -5920.7228, so some of today’s advance is happening against negative daily delta. Recent intraday flow also warned of stall risk near the highs: confirmed buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 and 2110.32, plus bearish_absorption at 2114.31. Funding is still negative as well, with funding_current -0.00001164 and funding_summary consecutive_direction_hours -27. I overrode those contradictions because none of them have yet damaged the daily trend structure: price is still above daily value, above RVWAP, above AVWAP, above both higher-timeframe EMAs, and the daily footprint and whale participation remain net positive. In other words, the daily tape may be distributing at the edge of the move, but the daily market structure is still Bullish.

4h.story: I label 4h Bullish, but with mixed agreement because the uptrend is currently pulling back under nearby resistance. Current price is 2104.64. On raw price structure, the recent 4h bars still show an advancing recovery from the 2060.09 low printed on 2026-03-14 08:00: closes progressed 2072.65, 2073.55, 2076.25, 2095.27, 2095.17, and the active bar is now 2104.64. The trend regime is bullish on this timeframe: ema_trend_regime trend_regime_by_tf shows 4h bull, and current price remains above 4h EMA100 2026.62 and 4h EMA200 2001.84. Price is also above anchored AVWAP 2068.76 and slightly above 4h RVWAP 2103.6854 with z_price_minus_rvwap +0.22. Flow on the completed 4h bars is constructive: 4h CVD printed delta_fut +35591.616 and delta_spot +682.2765 on the 00:00 bar, then delta_fut +38337.315 and delta_spot +3101.3794 on the 04:00 bar. 4h footprint also supports the bullish read with window_delta +47256.671, POC 2098.0, VAH 2108.0, VAL 2092.5, and current price above the 4h volume POC. Whale participation is strongly positive as well: 4h fut_whale_delta_notional is +76585261.11472, with spot also positive at +914698.05. For the structural range, I use 2101.0 as support because that is the active 4h TPO VAL, and 2116.35 as resistance because that is the active 4h TPO VAH and current session high. Price is above 4h VAL but still below 4h TPO POC 2108.51 and below VAH 2116.35, so the market is in the upper half of value but has not re-accepted the top yet. Contradictions are real. The current global orderbook snapshot is offer-heavy with obi -0.21235, ofi_norm_fut -0.12996 and a nearby ask wall at 2110.23. The current cvd_pack snapshot is short-term negative with delta_fut -717.479 and cvd_slope_fut -184.6391. Recent top-of-range flow is also bearish: confirmed buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 and 2110.32, plus bearish_absorption at 2114.31. I overrode those bearish signals because they are local rejection signals inside a still-intact 4h advance: price remains above 2101.0 TPO VAL, above RVWAP, above AVWAP, above both 4h higher-timeframe EMAs, and the completed 4h bars still show positive CVD, positive footprint delta and strong whale buying. That combination keeps the 4h trend Bullish, but only with mixed agreement because the tape is currently digesting under 2110 to 2116 resistance.
